name: Zeabur Cloud Deployment Platform API
what_it_does: Developer-friendly cloud deployment platform with REST API — enabling developers to deploy web applications, APIs, databases, and containers from GitHub in one click, with automatic language detection (Node.js, Python, Go, Ruby, PHP, Java, Deno, Bun), managed services (PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, MongoDB), and multi-region deployment including Asia-Pacific.
use_cases: Deploying web applications via Zeabur API from GitHub repository for automated deployment pipeline
Managing Zeabur services and environment variables via API for multi-environment configuration
Provisioning Zeabur managed databases via API for PostgreSQL/Redis/MongoDB setup
Querying Zeabur deployment status and logs via API for deployment monitoring
Scaling Zeabur service replicas via API for automated capacity management
not_for: Enterprise workloads requiring SOC2 or compliance certifications
Teams requiring US-only data residency (Zeabur focuses on Asia-Pacific regions)
Complex microservices architectures requiring advanced networking (use Kubernetes)
best_when: An Asia-Pacific startup or developer needs a Railway/Render alternative with strong Asia-Pacific region support (Taiwan, Hong Kong, Tokyo, Singapore) — with one-click GitHub deploys and managed databases.
avoid_when: You need enterprise compliance, US-only data residency, or advanced networking features.

auth.notes: API token from Zeabur dashboard. Bearer token auth. No OAuth2. No fine-grained scopes — API token provides full account access. Webhook for deployment events. GitHub OAuth for repository connection. CLI (zbr) for local deployment. Environment variable management via API.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Serverless plan: limited free usage with credit system
pricing.paid_tiers: Developer plan $5/month; Team plan $20/month; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Taiwan-based company. Founded 2022 by Yuchen Liu and team. YCombinator W23. Raised $3.5M seed. Focus on Asia-Pacific developer market. Regions: Taiwan (Taipei), Hong Kong, Tokyo, Singapore, US-West, EU-Frankfurt. Automatic language detection — no Dockerfile required for common stacks. Immutable deployments with rollback. GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket integration. One-click service marketplace (PostgreSQL, Redis, MongoDB, MySQL, RabbitMQ). Growing developer community especially in APAC.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for service and project management. Bearer token auth. Documentation is good but evolving (young platform). Webhook for deployment events. GitHub integration required for repo-based deploys. No compliance certifications. Rate limits not documented. Strong APAC region coverage.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Service reads idempotent by ID. Project reads idempotent. Deployment triggers not idempotent — each trigger creates new deployment. Environment variable sets idempotent by key.
known_agent_gotchas: Young platform (2022) — API may evolve and break compatibility
No compliance certifications — not suitable for regulated industries
GitHub OAuth required for repository-based deployments
Credit system for free tier — runs out, then billing starts
Rate limits not documented — test before high-frequency operations

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. No compliance certifications documented. Bearer token auth — no OAuth2 or scope granularity. Environment variables encrypted at rest. GitHub OAuth for repository access. Immutable deployments reduce configuration drift. Young company — security posture still maturing. Multi-region with data residency control.
